# Experiment

**Summary**: Controlled laboratory studies to isolate variables and test specific biological responses.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] conducted an experimental study to evaluate the uptake of petroleum hydrocarbons from diesel-contaminated soil by Avicennia marina.
